title: Draft Hilichurl Ballads
content:
{{Book Collection Infobox |image = Item Draft Lines of Hilichurlian Poetry.png |quality = 2 |region_lore = Mondstadt |region_location = Mondstadt |volumes = 3 |vol1 = Reward for successfully completing the commission ''[[Poetry Exchange]]'' |vol2 = ''Unavailable'' |vol3 = ''Unavailable'' }} '''''Draft Hilichurl Ballads''''' is a series of drafts rewarded for completing the {{Quest|Poetry Exchange}}. ==Vol. 1== {{Description|A [[Hilichurlian]] poem created by [[Ella Musk]]. According to her, this Recital of Friendship is the work of many hands. Still, you can't help but feel that something sounds a bit off when you read it...}} Olah! Olah!
Yoyo mosi mita!
Nye, nye mosi mita,
Yeye mosi gusha!
Mosi gusha, mosi tiga,
Yeye kucha kucha! ==Vol. 2== {{Description|A Hilichurlian poem created by Ella Musk. According to her, this Stirring Narrative is the work of many hands. Still, you can't help but feel that something sounds a bit off when you read it...}} ''Volume currently unavailable.'' ==Vol. 3== {{Description|A Hilichurlian poem created by Ella Musk. According to her, this Elegant Lyric Poem is the work of many hands. Still, you can't help but feel that something sounds a bit off when you read it...}} ''Volume currently unavailable.'' ==Other Languages== {{Other Languages |en = Draft Hilichurl Ballads |zhs = 丘丘语诗歌试作 |zhs_rm = Qiūqiūyǔ Shīgē Shìzuò |zht = 丘丘語詩歌試作 |zht_rm = Qiūqiūyǔ Shīgē Shìzuò |zh_tl = Hilichurlian Poem Draft |ja = ヒルチャール語詩試作 |ja_rm = Hiruchaaru-go Shi Shisaku |ja_tl = Hilichurlian Poem Draft |ko = 츄츄어 시도작 |ko_rm = Chuchu'eo Sidojak |ko_tl = Draft Hilichurl Poems |es = Antología de baladas en hilichurlio |es_tl = Anthology of Poems in Hilichurlian |fr = Anthologie de poèmes Brutocollinus |fr_tl = Anthology of Hilichurl Poems |ru = Проба пера в хиличурлской поэзии |ru_tl = An Attempt in Hilichurlian Poetry |th = บทเพลงของ Hilichurl |th_rm = |th_tl = Hilichurl's Song |vi = Mẫu Thơ Ca Hilichurl |vi_tl = |de = Hilichurlische Literatur |de_tl = Hilichurlian Literature |id = Naskah Balada Hilichurl |id_tl = Hilichurl Ballad Text |pt = Rascunhos de Poemas de Hilichurls |pt_tl = |tr = Taslak Dağ Yabanisi Seçkileri |tr_tl = Draft {{lex|Hilichurl|tr}} Selections |it = Bozza delle ballate hilichurliane |it_tl = }} ==Change History== {{Change History|1.0}} ==Navigation== {{Book Navbox|Mondstadt}} [[es:Antología de baladas en hilichurlio]] [[fr:Anthologie de poèmes Brutocollinus]] [[it:Bozza delle ballate hilichurliane]] [[ja:ヒルチャール語詩試作]] [[pt-br:Rascunhos de Poemas dos Hilichurls]] [[ru:Проба пера в хиличурлской поэзии]] [[tr:Taslak Dağ Yabanisi Seçkileri]] [[uk:Чернетки гілічурських балад]] [[vi:Mẫu Thơ Ca Hilichurl]]
